Stufful

#0758 Salazzle #0760 Bewear
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Stufful is a Normal/Fighting type Pokémon introduced in Generation 7.

Stufful's cute appearance and movements - plus the fluffy feel of its fur - all combine to make it super popular. Stufful may have a small body, but its strength is extraordinary. Receiving one of its powerful hits without being prepared for it can bring down even well-trained Pokémon.

Stufful

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0759
Type Normal Fighting
Species Flailing Pokémon
Height 0.5 m (1′08″)
Weight 6.8 kg (15.0 lbs)
Abilities 1. Fluffy
2. Klutz
Cute Charm (hidden ability)
Local № 0169 (Sun/Moon — Alola dex)
0205 (U.Sun/U.Moon — Alola dex)
0094 (Sword/Shield)

Training

EV yield 1 Attack
Catch rate 140 (18.3% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 68
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 15 (3,599–3,855 steps)

Evolution chart

#0759
Stufful
Normal · Fighting
(Level 27)
#0760
Bewear
Normal · Fighting

Stufful changes

  • In Generation 7, Stufful has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Sun Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.
Moon A touch from anyone except a known friend sends it into a surging frenzy. It’s an incredibly dangerous Pokémon.
Ultra Sun It boasts power enough to split large trees in half. The organ on its rear releases an odor that it uses to communicate with others of its kind.
Ultra Moon Stufful hates to be hugged or touched in any way. It will squirm, thrash, and resist with amazing power.
Sword Its fluffy fur is a delight to pet, but carelessly reaching out to touch this Pokémon could result in painful retaliation.
Shield The way it protects itself by flailing its arms may be an adorable sight, but stay well away. This is flailing that can snap thick tree trunks.

Moves learned by Stufful

Legends: Z-A Sword/Shield

Moves learnt by level up

Stufful does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Stufful cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
